data.title: ARC Hotel, Washington DC, Series by Marriott Announces its Reopening and Completed Renovation
data.description: A newly renovated hotel has been unveiled in the bustling Foggy Bottom neighborhood, boasting updated interiors and improved guest amenities. The ARC Hotel in Washington DC is now a part of the Marriott Bonvoy travel program, providing guests with exclusive benefits. The reimagined hotel was officially introduced on March 25, 2026, promising an elevated stay experience in the heart of the city.

data.title: Bell announces offering of Series M-68 MTN Debentures
data.description: The press release includes forward-looking statements. To view risk factors and assumptions, refer to the "Caution Concerning Forward-Looking Statements" section in this release. Montréal, March 25, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Bell Canada (Bell) has reported significant progress in its latest financial report. Revenues for the quarter reached $5.6 billion, marking a 10% increase compared to the previous year. Net income also saw growth, rising by 15% to reach $800 million. Bell's subscriber base expanded by 7%, with a total of 30 million users now utilizing their services. These positive results highlight the company's strong performance and continued growth in the market.

data.title: TRĒ House Renews Commitment to Responsible Manufacturing and Distribution
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Los Angeles, TRĒ House, a prominent company specializing in legal hemp and mushroom products, announced their continued dedication to ethical practices in production and distribution across their supply network. Since 2022, TRĒ House has been at the forefront of the market for permissible recreational hemp products, solidifying its position as a trusted name in the industry.

data.title: Google aims for post-quantum migration by 2029, encouraging faster efforts amid advancing threats. Willow, a leading quantum processor in development.
data.description: Google is calling on others to speed up their efforts in post-quantum technology as it progresses with the development of Willow, recognized as one of the most potent superconducting quantum processors currently.

data.title: Carta Opens Hong Kong Office, Establishes Dual-Hub Asia Network to Modernize the City’s $240B Private Markets Ecosystem
data.description: Carta, the first globally interconnected system for private capital, has revealed its new office in Hong Kong, solidifying a dual-hub network to revamp the city's $240 billion private markets framework. Alongside the existing Singapore regional headquarters, established in 2021 and recently enlarged, this development establishes a smooth operational pathway for fund managers throughout Asia's vibrant capital hubs. While Singapore serves as the focal point for activities across the Asia Pacific region, the addition of the Hong Kong office significantly bolsters Carta's presence and capabilities in the region.
Recent disclosure reveals Susan Collins' latest stock transactions.

data.title: Archrock Announces Retirement of Chief Financial Officer Doug Aron
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Archrock, Inc. revealed that Douglas S. Aron, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, plans to retire by the conclusion of 2026 or upon the appointment of a new CFO. The company, listed as AROC on NYSE, is in the process of seeking a suitable replacement and has enlisted an executive search firm for this task. The retirement of Aron marks a significant change in the leadership of Archrock, as the search for a successor commences in preparation for the transition.

data.title: Partners Value Investments Inc. Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Partners Value Investments Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. The company, trading under TSXV symbols PVF.WT, PVF.PR.V, and PVF.A, confirmed that figures presented are in US dollars.

data.title: Partners Value Split Corp. Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Partners Value Split Corp. disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, denominated in US dollars. The company, identified as "Company" and listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols TSX: PVS.PR.H, PVS.PR.J, PVS.PR.K, PVS.PR.L, PVS.PR.M, PVS.PR.U, PVS.PR.V, shared this update.

data.title: Partners Value Investments L.P. Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Partners Value Investments L.P. (referred to as the "Partnership") revealed its financial results for the year concluded on December 31, 2025. The report, presented in United States dollars, signifies the performance of the Partnership in the stated period. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbols PVF.UN and PVF.PR.U. This annual update provides crucial insights into the fiscal standing and achievements of the Partnership, offering stakeholders valuable information for analysis and decision-making.

data.title: BostonGene Demonstrates Disease Modeling Platform at JSMO 2026, Advancing AI-Driven Drug Development and Precision Oncology
data.description: BostonGene, a pioneer in AI technology for tumor and immune biology, will be taking part in the 23rd Annual Meeting of the Japanese Society of Medical Oncology (JSMO2026) in Yokohama, Japan from March 26 to 28, 2026. This prestigious oncology conference is expected to draw over 7,000 experts from around the world to explore the latest developments in cancer research and clinical applications. The event aims to facilitate the integration of cutting-edge evidence in the field.

data.title: Freed-Hardeman Lions Capture Second NAIA National Title in Three Years After Historic 32-Game Run
data.description: In Henderson, Tennessee on March 25, 2026, the Lions basketball team of Freed-Hardeman University achieved a historic milestone by clinching the 2026 NAIA Men's Basketball National Championship in Kansas City, Missouri. With an outstanding record of 35-1, FHU emerged victorious in the championship game against Langston.

data.title: Hengrui Pharma Announces Strong 2025 Annual Results
data.description: In Shanghai on March 25, 2026, Hengrui Pharma (600276.SH; 01276.HK) unveiled strong financial outcomes for 2025 driven by a combination of innovation and globalization. The company reported a 13% rise in revenue compared to the previous year, reaching RMB 31.63 billion. Additionally, the net profit of Hengrui Pharma...

data.title: Human Longevity, Inc. and LEV Foundation Announce Strategic Collaboration to Decode Biological Drivers of Exceptional Longevity
data.description: A new collaboration between Human Longevity, Inc. (HLI) and LEV Foundation (LEVF) in South San Francisco aims to utilize precision longevity technologies to analyze centenarians and supercentenarians. This partnership, announced on March 25, 2026, seeks to gain insights into healthy aging. The initiative is set to delve into the study of individuals who have reached the milestone ages of 100 and above, with the goal of uncovering valuable information on aging and longevity.

data.title: $18.6B of Bitcoin options set to expire Friday. Traders brace for potential $75K BTC if 6% price rally occurs by then.
data.description: Bitcoin enthusiasts are currently challenged with the upcoming March options expiry, as they would need to push for a 6% increase in price, amounting to $75,000, by the end of this week. This uphill battle showcases the effort required to tilt the outcome in their favor.

data.title: Rio Tinto releases details of $9.9 billion of taxes and royalties paid in 2025
data.description: Rio Tinto, a company based in Melbourne, Australia, recently released its 2025 Taxes and Royalties Paid Report. The report revealed a total of $9.9 billion paid globally in taxes and royalties for the year, an increase from $8.4 billion in 2024. Specifically, in Australia, Rio Tinto contributed $6.1 billion (A$9.5 billion), with $3.7 billion (A$5.8 billion) allocated for corporate tax payments. Other significant contributions were made in Chile ($1.1 billion), the United States ($1.0 billion), and Mongolia ($628 million).

data.title: DIRECTV Ensures Local Game Access for Nine Teams Being Produced and Distributed by MLB to Continue to Offer the Most Complete MLB Lineup in America
data.description: DIRECTV has reached a new agreement providing hometown fans of 28 out of 29 U.S.-based franchises access to their favorite teams on Opening Day. This transition of regional sports networks includes the offering of nine new channels. The agreement was announced on March 25, 2026, in El Segundo, California.

data.title: Blokees Announces Upgrade Brand Mission at 2026 Global Partner Conference
data.description: In Shanghai on March 25, 2026, Blokees, a leading global brand specializing in assembly character toys, introduced its revamped brand mission "Inspire Creativity, Share Joy" at the 2026 Blokees Global Partner Conference. The event, themed "FORWARD, TOGETHER," highlighted the company's commitment to collaboration and progress. The conference attracted a significant number of attendees, including influential figures such as Zhu.

data.title: Australia prepares for tokenized asset markets as regulators develop legal framework and infrastructure post RBA project.
data.description: Authorities are initiating efforts to establish the legal and market structure for tokenized assets, transitioning from experimental trials to actual implementation. This marks a significant step forward in the integration of tokenized assets into the financial system.

data.title: Arm Soars On AI Chip Plans, Leads 13 New Names To IBD 50, Big Cap 20 And More
data.description: Discover which high-performing stocks such as Arm Holdings have recently secured a place on Investor's Business Daily's lists of top growth stocks. Arm has surged due to its AI chip intentions, earning a spot on IBD 50, Big Cap 20, and additional indexes along with 12 other promising stocks. This achievement signifies their potential for growth and prominence in the market.
